title: Squirrel Removal in Lawrence, Long Island | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Lawrence, NY. Expert exclusion, humane trapping, and damage repair. Serving Long Island for over 15 years. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Lawrence, Long Island, where they frequently invade attics, damage soffits, and chew through wiring in residential homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Lawrence, including humane trapping, entry point sealing, and full attic restoration. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by the mature trees and older homes in this Nassau County community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Lawrence and the greater Long Island area for over 15 years with certified wildlife removal specialists who use humane, effective methods. We offer same-day emergency service, complete exclusion solutions, and a satisfaction guarantee that ensures squirrels won't return to your property.
localContext: Lawrence's tree-lined streets and proximity to coastal areas create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive, particularly around the historic homes near Cedarhurst and the neighborhoods near Lawrence Middle School. The community's mix of Tudor-style homes and vintage architecture often feature vulnerable entry points like decorative gables and older roof vents that squirrels exploit to access attics.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Lawrence, NY?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Lawrence typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping, exclusion work, and minor repairs. More extensive attic restoration or significant structural repairs may cost additional.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Lawrence home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic during early morning or dusk, visible damage to roof soffits or vents, chewed electrical wiring, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roofline. You may also notice acorns or nesting materials in your attic space.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Lawrence humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal methods for squirrel removal in Lawrence. We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not re-enter. We follow all New York State wildlife regulations and prioritize the safety of both the animals and your family.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Lawrence home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Lawrence and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. We'll seal all entry points permanently to prevent future invasions.
